claim: Agent optimization requires balancing accuracy, cost, and latency by exploring configuration space (models, tools, prompts) and scaling approaches (vertical: longer chains; horizontal: ensemble sampling)
actionable: Use systematic configuration testing (model selection, tool optimization, prompt tuning) combined with horizontal scaling (best-of-n) to optimize cost-accuracy-latency tradeoffs
source_title: AI Dev 26 x SF | Or Dagan: Optimizing Accuracy, Cost, and Latency in Real-World Agents

claim: Best-of-n sampling with LLM-as-judge can improve smaller models to match frontier model performance at lower cost by running multiple inferences in parallel and selecting best output
actionable: When latency is not critical, use best-of-n sampling with smaller, cheaper models to match frontier model quality
source_title: AI Dev 26 x SF | Or Dagan: Optimizing Accuracy, Cost, and Latency in Real-World Agents

claim: Ensemble agents using diverse models solve different subsets of tasks, creating Venn diagrams of capability that improve both accuracy and cost compared to single large model runs
actionable: Build agent ensembles with complementary models (different sizes and types) to maximize accuracy while reducing cost
source_title: AI Dev 26 x SF | Or Dagan: Optimizing Accuracy, Cost, and Latency in Real-World Agents

claim: Manual agent optimization is unsustainable - configuration space explodes with model choices, tool combinations, scaling approaches, and becomes non-future-proof when models or pricing change
actionable: Invest in automated agent optimization systems rather than manual configuration tuning to avoid rework when models or pricing change
source_title: AI Dev 26 x SF | Or Dagan: Optimizing Accuracy, Cost, and Latency in Real-World Agents

claim: Action models can predict accuracy, cost, and latency of agent actions at runtime, enabling dynamic orchestration that matches task-specific needs without pre-configuration
actionable: Train action models to predict agent performance metrics and use them for runtime orchestration of diverse execution strategies
source_title: AI Dev 26 x SF | Or Dagan: Optimizing Accuracy, Cost, and Latency in Real-World Agents
